summary: INQUE iteration 2 full-stack verification. Backend pytest 10/10 PASSED — /api/inquiries (consultation/general/salvix), validation 400/422, list endpoints, /api/artist-applications all healthy. Frontend Playwright covered home load + brand mark INQUE, navbar+sections+footer presence, Salvix products (Balm/Glide), FAQ accordion expand, Artist Program pillars, hero-cta-shop scroll, program-apply-cta scroll, contact-instagram href, all 3 contact tabs submitting (general -> /api/inquiries inquiry_type=general 201, wholesale -> /api/inquiries inquiry_type=salvix 201, program -> /api/artist-applications 201) with inquiry-success rendering, desktop nav anchors (salvix/about), and mobile menu toggle showing all 4 mobile-nav-* items. No critical defects found.

issues: FastAPI app title is still 'OBSIDIAN ATELIER API' in /app/backend/server.py:21 — cosmetic only, brand was renamed to INQUE; consider updating to 'INQUE API' for consistency with the rebrand.

action_items: (Optional cosmetic) Rename FastAPI title from 'OBSIDIAN ATELIER API' to 'INQUE API' in /app/backend/server.py to complete rebrand.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py: validation for inquiry_type duplicates Pydantic logic; could be replaced with Literal type for cleaner OpenAPI schema.
server.py uses deprecated FastAPI @app.on_event('shutdown'); migrate to lifespan context manager (FastAPI >=0.93).
Contact.jsx: no client-side guard for tab='program' minimum statement length (backend enforces 20 chars via 422). Consider showing a friendlier message if backend validation triggers.
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_-prefixed inquiries and one artist application via UI submissions for verification.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend test file at /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py covers all endpoints (10 tests). Field components in Contact.jsx attach data-testid directly to the <input>/<textarea>, so use selectors like [data-testid="field-name"] (not a wrapper). Reveal animations are IntersectionObserver-based (~1.4s); allow ~2s after navigation. All product data-testids: product-01 (Salvix Balm), product-02 (Salvix Glide). Backend stores datetime as ISO string then parses back on list.
